allow: Bash(node -e "const fs = require\(''fs''\); const data = JSON.parse\(fs.readFileSync\(''e:/Paulo/Projects/investment-advisor/data/personas/buffett-index.json''\)\); const years = {}; data.forEach\(item => { years[item.metadata.year] = \(years[item.metadata.year] || 0\) + 1; }\); Object.keys\(years\).sort\(\(a,b\) => parseInt\(a\) - parseInt\(b\)\).forEach\(y => console.log\(y + '': '' + years[y]\)\);")

Bash(node -e "const fs = require\(''fs''\); const data = JSON.parse\(fs.readFileSync\(''e:/Paulo/Projects/investment-advisor/data/personas/buffett-index.json''\)\); const firstChunk = data[0]; console.log\(''Total chunks:'', data.length\); console.log\(''Embedding dimension:'', firstChunk.embedding.length\); console.log\(''Text length \(first chunk\):'', firstChunk.text.length\); console.log\(''Average text length:'', Math.round\(data.reduce\(\(sum, c\) => sum + c.text.length, 0\) / data.length\)\);")
